channel.title: Portapps
channel.description: Collection of portable apps for Windows

item.title: ueli portable 9.27.1-12
item.description:
Release of ueli portable 9.27.1-12 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the ueli portable page.

item.title: Nextcloud portable 33.0.2-24
item.description:
Release of Nextcloud portable 33.0.2-24 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the Nextcloud portable page.

item.title: IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate portable 2026.1-46
item.description:
Release of IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate portable 2026.1-46 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate portable page.

item.description:

item.title: Discord portable 1.0.9232-25
item.description:

You can find links to download this release on the Discord portable page.

item.title: Brave portable 1.89.132-99
item.description:
Release of Brave portable 1.89.132-99 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the Brave portable page.

item.title: Portapps 3.18.0
item.description:
• Inline the ASAR header hash generation in the core build (#437)
  • Switch direct YAML imports to go.yaml.in/yaml/v3 (#436)
  • Modernize error handling and remove legacy path helpers (#435)
  • Fix innosetup download url (#432)
  • Fix go utility error handling regressions (#434)
  • Go 1.26 (#433)
  • Bump github.com/go-viper/mapstructure/v2 from 2.4.0 to 2.5.0 (#423)
  • Bump github.com/rs/zerolog from 1.34.0 to 1.35.0 (#430)
  • Bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.36.0 to 0.42.0 (#421 #428)
